name: Badge
description: A small badge component for displaying notification counts, status indicators, or labels. Can be used standalone or as a wrapper around other elements.
usage_guidelines: Use to display notification counts, unread messages, or status indicators.
Wrap around other components (like icons or avatars) to show contextual information.
Use content prop for numeric badges, omit for dot indicators.
Set maxCount to prevent very large numbers from breaking layout.
Use standalone (without children) for simple labels or counts.

badgeStyle.description: Custom inline styles for the badge element.

content.description: Badge content (text or number). Omit for dot-style badge.

innerClass.description: Additional CSS classes for the badge inner element.

maxCount.description: Maximum count to display. Numbers exceeding this show as 'maxCount+'.

styling_info.visual_description: A small circular or pill-shaped indicator, typically positioned at the top-right corner of wrapped elements. Can be a small dot or contain text/numbers. Uses primary color by default.

Do: Use for notification counts and status indicators
Set appropriate maxCount for numeric badges
Position badges consistently across your application
Use dot badges for simple presence indicators
Dont: Don't use for large amounts of text
Don't use without children for positioned badges
Don't set maxCount too high (defeats the purpose)
